name: Kasseri, Tomato and Basil Cresents (Kasseropi
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, blend warm water, olive oil, red wine vinegar, and Egg. Add salt.
2. Gradually stir in enough flour until the dough pulls away from the sides of the bowl.
3. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes.
4. Shape dough into a round ball. Grease a bowl.
5. Add dough to the greased bowl, turning to coat the surface. Cover with a damp towel and let stand in a warm, draft-free area for 30 minutes.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. In a bowl, combine Kasseri cheese, chopped tomatoes, fresh basil, and paprika.
8. Divide dough into 8 pieces. Shape each piece into a smooth round.
9. Roll each round on a lightly floured surface until it is about 1/4 to 1/8 inch thick.
10. Spoon some of the cheese mixture down the center of each round.
11. Fold one side over the filling and press edges together to seal.
12. Arrange cresents on prepared baking sheets. Sprinkle with paprika.
13. Bake until the cheese has melted and the pastry is golden brown, about 40 minutes.
14. Serve hot.
